configFields.label: Broker URL
configFields.description: MQTT broker URL, e.g. mqtt://localhost:1883, mqtts://host:8883, or ws://host:9001.

configFields.label: Topics
configFields.description: Topic filter(s) to subscribe to. Comma-separate several; MQTT wildcards + (single level) and # (multi level) are allowed, e.g. home/+/temperature, sensors/#.

configFields.label: QoS
configFields.description: Subscription quality of service: 0 (at most once), 1 (at least once), or 2 (exactly once). Defaults to 1.
